Providers

+

Install & updates

- Codex · Claude Code · Cursor · Gemini · Antigravity · z.ai + Download from GitHub Releases or install via Homebrew. Sparkle updates are enabled on GitHub builds only.

-

Data sources

+

Providers

- CLI + local RPC where available, web dashboards via browser cookies for Codex/Claude/Cursor, plus z.ai API key - support (z.ai dashboard). + Codex · Claude Code · Cursor · Gemini · Antigravity · Droid · Copilot · z.ai
+ Open to new providers — see the provider guide.

Privacy

Reuses existing browser cookies (Safari/Chrome/Firefox) for dashboard access — no passwords stored. When cookies - are missing, CodexBar falls back to local CLI output. + are missing, CodexBar falls back to local CLI output. Audit notes in + issue #12. +

+
+
+ +
+
+

Usage tracking

+

+ Session + weekly meters with reset countdowns, plus optional credits and code review limits. +

+
+
+

Status + widgets

+

+ Provider status polling with incident badges, plus a WidgetKit snapshot that mirrors the menu card.

+
+

CLI + automation

+

+ Bundled codexbar CLI for scripts and CI, with Linux CLI builds on GitHub Releases. +

+
+
+ +
+
+

macOS permissions

+

+ Full Disk Access only for Safari cookies, Keychain access for tokens, and Files & Folders prompts when + provider CLIs access project directories. +
